text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Clothing Donation Programs * Children 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Children Disaster/Emergency Issues Infants/Toddlers Men Pregnant Individuals Women Youth Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF WARRENTON FIRST BAPTIST CHURCH CHILDREN'S CLOTHING BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers gently used clothing with sizes for infants through sixth grade. Accepts donations of new car seats, gently used toys, and children's clothing. 30 NE 1st Street Warrenton, OR 97146 Eligibility: Ages 0-12 Hours: Friday, 3pm-6pm and Saturday, 10am-1pm (503) 791-7522 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WARRENTON FIRST BAPTIST CHURCH CHILDREN'S CLOTHING BANK
